title: Unique 80753 Plastic Foil Tablecloth-2.13 m x 1.37 m-Dainty Unicorn Party-1 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Plastic tablecloth measures 2.13 m x 1.37 m
Protects your table at a unicorn theme party
Table cover is waterproof, can be wiped clean, and is reusable
Combine with other Dainty Unicorn party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Transform your party table into a whimsical wonderland with this Dainty Unicorn Plastic Tablecloth! Featuring pastel colors, elegant unicorn designs and dreamy accents, this table cover is perfect for a girl’s birthday party, baby shower, or any magical occasion. Made from durable, waterproof plastic, it protects your table while adding a touch of enchantment. Safety Warning PACKAGING WARNING: TO AVOID DANGER OF SUFFOCATION, KEEP THIS PLASTIC BAG AWAY FROM BABIES AND CHILDREN. DO NOT USE THIS BAG IN CRIBS, BEDS, STROLLERS OR PLAYPENS. THIS BAG IS NOT A TOY.
